design_philosophy: Objective, highly functional, and authoritative. Designed as a data-dense 'Control Room' for environmental analysts. Prioritizes legibility, data correlation, and precision over decorative elements.

colors.description: High-contrast structural grayscale paired with signal colors for data status.

typography.strategy: Swiss Brutalist - Radical weight contrast (Black vs Light).

fonts.installation: Import from Google Fonts or Fontshare

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter font-black leading-none

global.padding_scale: Generous spacing for report (p-8 to p-24), tight spacing for dashboard (p-4 to p-6).
global.border_radius: Rounded-none to rounded-md max (max 8px). Sharp, technical feel.

grid_strategy.mode: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
grid_strategy.dashboard_layout: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-0 or gap-px (using border-collapse logic)
grid_strategy.sidebar_area: col-span-1 row-span-2 h-[80vh] md:h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] overflow-y-auto border-l border-border

login_hero.style: Full bleed image with bg-black/50 overlay (darker for contrast). Content is left-aligned, high contrast.

dashboard_panels.style: GRID BORDERS (The 'Technical' Look). Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle borders (border-border), no rounded corners, exposing the skeletal grid.

map_controls.style: GLASSMORPHISM (The 'Crystal' Variant). backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark), 1px delicate inner stroke, soft ambient shadow.

agent_pipeline_active_step.style: THE 'TRACING BEAM'. Active state gets a bright left border (border-l-4 border-primary) and a subtle background tint (bg-primary/10) to indicate processing.

report_cards.style: Flat, pure geometric rectangles. border border-border/50, p-6 or p-8, sharp corners.

buttons.primary: Sharp corners, bg-primary text-white, hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-200. Focus: ring-2 ring-primary/50 ring-offset-2

map.features: Interactive polygon drawing tool (leaflet-draw). Base maps should toggle between light/dark standard tiles (e.g., CartoDB Positron/DarkMatter) based on app theme.

charts.styling: Stroke width 2px. Grid lines must be subtle (stroke-border). Tooltips must use Glassmorphism style. NO gradients in lines, use solid high-contrast semantic colors.

agent_status_list.styling: Vertical stepper/list. Staggered entrance animations. Use 'lucide-react' icons (e.g., Loader2 for processing, CheckCircle2 for done, Circle for pending). Active text should be high-contrast, inactive should be text-secondary.

testing.requirement: All interactive elements, forms, and key metric displays MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='start-analysis-btn').

images.description: Satellite capture of Earth, representing the GEE and Sentinel-5P TROPOMI data source. Use as a full-bleed background for the login page with a dark overlay.
Atmospheric view of smog city skyline. Use in the generated report header to establish emotional context of air pollution.

icons.usage_command: npm install lucide-react or yarn add lucide-react

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the color palette and typography rules defined in this JSON.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans. Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Implement the 'Control Room' grid layout for the dashboard: Map takes 3 columns, Sidebar (Agent Pipeline) takes 1 column on desktop.
Apply Glassmorphism exactly as specified for map overlays/controls to ensure readability over the map.
Ensure the Agent Pipeline visually updates sequentially. Use the 'Tracing Beam' or highlighted border styling for the active agent.
Charts in the report page must use the semantic pollution colors (Low=Green, Med=Yellow, High=Red) where applicable.
Add 'data-testid' attributes to all major interactive elements for testing purposes.
Use the provided image URLs exclusively for media. Do not use placeholder services.
Implement a robust light/dark theme toggle that cascades down to the map tile layer as well.
